entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its ability to stimulate rhizospheric nitrogenase activity and fix nitrogen

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its ability to stimulate rhizospheric nitrogenase activity and fix nitrogen

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The activity of the enzyme nitrogenase, used as a measure of nitrogen fixation in the rhizosphere

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for plants

entities.name: ACETYLENE-REDUCTION ASSAY
entities.description: A technique used to measure nitrogenase activity

entities.name: SOIL-CORE ASSAY
entities.description: A method for measuring nitrogenase activity of field-grown plants

entities.name: PLANTED CORE ASSAY
entities.description: An improved core assay developed at ICRISAT for measuring nitrogenase activity

entities.name: GREENHOUSE ASSAY METHODS
entities.description: Controlled environment methods used to study nitrogenase activity in plants

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: The difference in the ability to stimulate nitrogenase activity among different crop lines or cultivars

entities.name: MOIST SOIL
entities.description: Soil moisture levels that favor nitrogenase activity

entities.name: WARM SOIL
entities.description: Soil temperature around 35 degrees Celsius that favors nitrogenase activity

entities.name: FERTILIZER N
entities.description: High levels of nitrogen fertilizer that decrease nitrogenase activity

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research center where the nitrogen fixation studies were conducted

entities.name: POT-CULTURE EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments conducted in pots to study nitrogen balance and the effects of inoculation

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of low-fertility soil used in pot-culture experiments

entities.name: VERMICULITE
entities.description: Unsterilized washed vermiculite used as a growth medium in experiments

entities.name: 15 N2
entities.description: The use of 15 N2 isotope to demonstrate nitrogen fixation in seedlings

entities.name: 15 N ISOTOPE DILUTION TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique used to evaluate genotypic variation in nitrogen fixation

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Microorganisms associated with crop roots that exhibit nitrogenase activity

entities.name: N2-FIXING BACTERIA
entities.description: Specific bacteria used for inoculation to increase plant growth and yield

entities.name: DRY-MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The increase in plant biomass resulting from inoculation with N2-fixing bacteria

entities.name: N UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which increases with N2-fixing bacteria inoculation

entities.name: PLANT DRY-MATTER YIELD
entities.description: The total dry biomass of the plant, which increases with N2-fixing bacteria inoculation
